where.venue: Various - Altea Old Town processions are highlights

what.description: Traditional Holy Week processions and celebrations across all Costa Blanca towns. Altea Old Town hosts particularly beautiful and atmospheric processions. Religious floats (pasos) carried through the streets, traditional music, and brotherhoods in ceremonial dress.

practical.parking: Limited in old towns, arrive early

meta.notes: Dates: March 29 - April 5, 2026. Major processions typically on Maundy Thursday, Good Friday, and Easter Sunday.
